title: xeraea maitlandii
intro: Xeraea maitlandii, also known as Maitland's xeranthemum, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xeraea maitlandii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
